description: Registry of fleets and vehicles within an organization, including fleet grouping, vehicle assignment to drivers, and vehicle type management.

actors.name: Fleet Operator
actors.description: Creates and manages fleet groups and vehicle records.

actors.name: Dispatcher
actors.description: Assigns vehicles to drivers and manages fleet composition.

actors.name: Platform
actors.description: Enforces vehicle assignment exclusivity and fleet membership rules.

fields.name: trim
fields.label: Trim level or variant of the vehicle.

fields.name: vehicle_type
fields.label: Classification of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck, motorcycle).

fields.name: status
fields.label: Current availability status of the vehicle.

fields.name: fleet_id
fields.label: Reference to the fleet this vehicle belongs to.

fields.name: driver_id
fields.label: Reference to the driver currently assigned to this vehicle.

fields.name: fleet_task
fields.label: Primary operational task of the fleet (e.g., pickup, delivery, shuttle).

fields.name: fleet_color
fields.label: Color code used to visually distinguish this fleet on maps.

fields.name: service_area_id
fields.label: Service area this fleet operates within.

fields.name: zone_id
fields.label: Zone within the service area assigned to this fleet.

rules.rule_01: A vehicle can only be actively assigned to one driver at a time; assigning it to a new driver automatically unassigns it from any previous driver.
rules.rule_02: A fleet can have multiple drivers and multiple vehicles as members.
rules.rule_03: Vehicles and drivers are linked to fleets via membership records (fleet_drivers, fleet_vehicles).
rules.rule_04: Fleet groups can be scoped to a specific service area or zone for operational routing.
rules.rule_05: All fleet and vehicle records are scoped to the organization (company).
rules.rule_06: Vehicle records support rich metadata including VIN data and telematics integration fields.
rules.rule_07: Drivers and vehicles are linked independently; a driver may be in a fleet without a vehicle assigned.

given: operator provides make, model, and optionally plate number and VIN

then.description: Vehicle record is persisted under the organization.

vehicle_registered.result: Vehicle is available for assignment to drivers and fleets.

given: dispatcher links a vehicle to a driver

then.description: Any previously assigned driver is automatically unlinked from the vehicle.

vehicle_assigned_to_driver.result: Driver is assigned to the vehicle exclusively.

then.description: Fleet group is created, optionally scoped to a service area or zone.

fleet_created.result: Fleet can be populated with drivers and vehicles.

given: dispatcher adds a driver to a fleet

then.description: Membership record links driver to fleet.

driver_added_to_fleet.result: Driver is a member of the fleet and subject to fleet-level operations.

given: dispatcher adds a vehicle to a fleet

then.description: Membership record links vehicle to fleet.

vehicle_added_to_fleet.result: Vehicle is tracked within the fleet's asset inventory.

errors.message: The specified vehicle could not be found.
The specified fleet could not be found.
This vehicle is already assigned to another driver.

events.name: fleet.vehicle_assigned
events.description: Vehicle is assigned to a driver within the fleet.

events.name: fleet.driver_added
events.description: Driver is added to a fleet.

related.reason: Vehicle assignment is validated as part of driver dispatch readiness.
Fleets can be scoped to a service area or zone.
Shift management determines which fleet members are active.

goals.description: Registry of fleets and vehicles within an organization, including fleet grouping, vehicle assignment to drivers, and vehicle type management.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts
Failed operations divided by total attempts

tradeoffs.reason: asset tracking must maintain precise location and status records
